articles.description: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden's is not guaranteed a place in England's squad for the 2026 World Cup, says manager Thomas Tuchel.
articles.title: Phil Foden: Manchester City midfielder's place in England's World Cup squad 'not guaranteed'

articles.description: Holders Arsenal secure an aggregate victory over Chelsea to reach the Women's Champions League semi-finals - despite conceding a late goal to Sjoeke Nusken.
articles.title: Women's Champions League: Chelsea 1-0 Arsenal (agg: 2-3): Holders reach semi-final

articles.description: Manchester United exit the Women's Champions League after Bayern Munich strike twice late on to end the English side's resistance.
articles.title: Bayern Munich 2-1 Manchester United (5-3 agg): German side score late to reach Women's Champions League semi-finals

articles.description: Italy captain Gianluigi Donnarumma says he "cried because of the enormous sadness" of not being able to lead the national side to the 2026 World Cup.
articles.title: Italy goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma vows to restore national side after failure to reach World Cup

articles.description: Chelsea has announced a Premier League‑record pre‑tax loss of £262m for the 2024‑25 season, surpassing the previous record of £179.5m set by Manchester City in 2011.
articles.title: Chelsea record pre-tax loss of £262.4m - the biggest in PL history

articles.description: Lamine Yamal says racist chants heard during Spain's 0-0 draw with Egypt in Barcelona on Tuesday were "disrespectful and intolerable".
articles.title: Lamine Yamal condemns racist abuse heard during Spain v Egypt friendly

articles.description: England white-ball captain Harry Brook and all-rounder Jacob Bethell are given a caution notice over their conduct on the tour of New Zealand last year.
articles.title: Englands Harry Brook and Jacob Bethell reprimanded over conduct on tour of New Zealand

articles.description: Emma Raducanu delays the start of her clay-court season as she continues to recover from a viral illness, according to her representatives.
articles.title: Emma Raducanu withdraws from Linz Open after viral illness

articles.description: Premier League clubs made payments of £460m to agents over the past year - a 13% increase on the previous 12 months.
articles.title: Premier League clubs spend record £460m on agent fees

articles.description: Everton are monitoring John Stones' contract situation at Manchester City, Sandro Tonali's representatives contact Real Madrid, Barcelona lead the race to sign Bernardo Silva, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Stones, Tonali, Silva, Kofane, Rashford, Kounde, Dumfries
